candidate_summary: Exploding Kittens card game 2015 Kickstarter; most-BACKED Kickstarter project of all time at completion.
observed_outcome_summary: Closed 2015-02-19 with $8,782,571 pledged by 219,382 backers against a $10,000 goal. Delivered to all backers by Sept 2015 — a positive fulfilled outcome and an unusually large buyer count for a low-priced item.
raw_outcome_evidence: Wikipedia 'Exploding Kittens', verbatim: 'At completion on February 19, 2015, it had US$8,782,571 in pledges by 219,382 backers.' Delivery: 'all backers received the game by September 2015.' (Operator-fetched 2026-05-31.)

action_signal_candidates.notes: 219,382 backers; $8,782,571 pledged; goal $10,000; delivered by Sept 2015. Tier-1.

geographic_demographic_notes: Driven heavily by creator Matthew Inman's (The Oatmeal) existing audience.
reviewer_notes: Recommended evidence_tier=1. Strong positive case (high backer count + full delivery). Recommended designation: TRAINING. Note creator-audience bias inflates buyer share vs a cold market.
uncertainty_flags: self_selected_denominator: backers/users are self-selected; the receptive/uncertain/skeptical proportions of the FULL addressable market are NOT externally observable
buyer_numerator_only: the action signal gives the buyer/action-positive count, not a four-bucket distribution
creator_audience_bias: large pre-existing fanbase inflates the buyer count vs a neutral market
